title: Iran War Live Updates: Fighting Flares in Lebanon, Complicating U.S.-Iran Peace Talks
summary_full: Israeli strikes killed at least 31 people in Lebanon on Tuesday, the country’s health ministry said, as Israel intensified attacks against Hezbollah. The fighting cast further doubt on fragile negotiations to end the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran.
